description: Style NoteFall head over heels in love with this chic and stylish handbag from baggit. Its timeless design is set to see you through many seasons to come. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can pair this bag with western as well as ethnic ensembles.Product DetailsGreen bag with gathered velvety panels at the sideThree zippered compartmentsSynthetic lining with zippered pocket in the centre compartmentOne zippered pocket at backTwo short handles for carrying easeFabric rosette detail attached to handle in frontMaterial and CareSynthetic, fabricWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtSizeHeight: 31cmWidth: 41cmDepth: 14 cm
